mapper.select: SELECT p.*, o.owner_name AS owner, u.nick_name AS manager FROM sys_property_info p LEFT JOIN sys_owner_info o ON p.owner_id = o.owner_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.manager_id = u.user_id WHERE p.property_id = #{propertyId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_property_info SET image_url = #{imageUrl}, update_time = NOW() WHERE property_id = #{propertyId}
